instruction: Implement merge(intervals): given a list of [start, end] intervals, merge all overlapping intervals and return the result sorted by start. merge([[1, 3], [2, 6], [8, 10], [15, 18]]) == [[1, 6], [8, 10], [15, 18]]; merge([[1, 4], [4, 5]]) == [[1, 5]].

files.test_merge_intervals.py:
from merge_intervals import merge


def test_merge_intervals():
    assert merge([[1, 3], [2, 6], [8, 10], [15, 18]]) == [[1, 6], [8, 10], [15, 18]]
    assert merge([[1, 4], [4, 5]]) == [[1, 5]]
    assert merge([[1, 4], [2, 3]]) == [[1, 4]]
